creator: matt@mattsnetwork.co.uk
text:
On Friday 15 September 2006 16:31, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of comms/xdx,
>
> Please note that PR ports/103302 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103302

Please commit. This is simply a change of e-mail address.
